text:
Now I have a good understanding of the notebook structure. Let me create a comprehensive guide on how to use Google Colab for training the model. I should provide a step-by-step guide covering:

2. Mounting Google Drive
3. Dataset preparation and upload

5. Running the training
6. Downloading the trained model
7. Using the model with the backend

Since I'm in read-only mode, I'll just provide guidance without making any changes.
